panels.title: Number of store-gateways hit per Query
Refetches of missing blocks per Query

targets.expr:
sum by(user) (rate(cortex_prometheus_notifications_errors_total{ job="pods"}[$__rate_interval]))
  /
sum by(user) (rate(cortex_prometheus_notifications_sent_total{ job="pods"}[$__rate_interval]))
> 0

sum by(user) (rate(cortex_prometheus_notifications_queue_length{ job="pods"}[$__rate_interval]))
  /
sum by(user) (rate(cortex_prometheus_notifications_queue_capacity{ job="pods"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0

sum by(user) (rate(cortex_prometheus_rule_evaluation_duration_seconds_sum{ job="pods"}[$__rate_interval]))
  /
sum by(user) (rate(cortex_prometheus_rule_evaluation_duration_seconds_count{ job="pods"}[$__rate_interval]))
